_meta.doktryna: EDYTUJ PRAWDE (0i v3) + kref na scenach produktowych (0i-b) + INTENCJA+REFY+ZAKAZY + PRE-NEUTRALIZACJA REFOW (lekcja stolika: refy elements przeciekaja scenografia/rekwizytami; kotwica tla w KAZDYM motion prompcie OD RAZU). Mata nie ma mechanizmu — 'akcja' = rozwiniecie/dotyk/polozenie sie (ciecia miedzy scenami). Loop-close = FLF.
_meta.kanon_kata: 3/4 z wysokosci lozka; mata duza w kadrze (>=55% w hooku/makro); sceny cielesne od tylu/boku BEZ pelnej twarzy; total sypialni tylko w tle scen (bez osobnej sceny total — 6 scen akcji)
_meta.engine_mix: hook/kolce/lezenie/relaks/stopy = kref (elements: frontal g4_clean + ref g5); cta = FLF (first=chain z hook_first po sekwencji, last=chain); klatki = nano-banana/edit; VO ElevenLabs v3 (Aria), muzyka+ambient+SFX Stable Audio 2.5
_meta.wybor_wzorca: WZORZEC-SCORE os A: 1 kandydat, score 46,5 (plays 658k @26k followers vr=0,25; ENG WYBITNY 11,3% — saves 17,3k = intencja zakupowa). Os B: talking-head => nasz wariant no-talk (jak masazer); WARIANT KOLORU ROZJECHANY (wzorzec kremowo-szary vs nasza aukcja CZARNO-FIOLETOWA) => tozsamosc wg Ali, kolor wzorca w forbidden_leaks. Os C: hook wzorca = napis problem-first (dziala bez dzwieku) — przenosimy jako VO+kinetyczny unroll; problem->rozwiazanie czytelne; product-clarity wysoka. WYBOR: jedyny kandydat, silny mechanizm narracyjny — AKCEPT.

wzorzec.hook_type: PROBLEM-FIRST napisowy ('if you work a desk job, this is for you') + testimonial twarzy; u nas: problem-first w VO + kinetyczny unroll maty (produkt-w-akcji od klatki 1)
wzorzec.audio_character: luzne-gadanie-tworcy (35 s testimonial, chwilami wulgarny, autentyczny); u nas: VO-story PL first-person (kondensacja jej luku: biurko -> skepsis -> 10 minut -> rytual) + SFX diegetyczne + spokojny beat

on_screen_text.text: if you work a desk job, this is for you

loop.jak: wzorzec bez petli (talking-head); MY dodajemy LOOP CLOSE (echo hooka: mata rozlozona na lozku + dlon)

wzorzec.reaction_sound: jej smiech/przeklenstwo (autentyzm); u nas: dlugi wydech ulgi w scenie relaksu (SFX)
wzorzec.comment_driver: czy to boli? / czy dziala na powazny bol plecow? — adresujemy scena 'kolce wygladaja groznie' + widoczna ulga
wzorzec.viral_carrier: face-testimonial (100% talking-head: 35 s twarzy tworczyni, mata tylko zrolowana w dloni)
wzorzec.voice_mode: testimonial-synced (v2: omnihuman na hook+ulga, B-roll z off-VO kontynuujacym)

sceny.rola: HOOK — kinetyczne rozwiniecie maty na lozku
sceny.first_frame_brief_en: A young woman's hands mid-motion unrolling the black acupressure mat from the reference images across a bed with cream bedding - the mat is HALF-unrolled, purple lotus spikes catching warm lamp light, the half-round pillow roll from the set lying at the head of the bed. The mat is EXACTLY the product from the reference photos, large in frame. Bright cozy bedroom in warm evening light: cream bedding, warm bedside lamp, light wall. High-key, photorealistic vertical 9:16 UGC smartphone look, natural skin texture on the hands.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. The woman's hands finish unrolling the black acupressure mat across the bed in one smooth energetic motion - the mat lands flat and soft on the bedding, purple lotus spikes clearly visible, then she gives the surface a quick straightening pat. The mat stays EXACTLY the product from the reference images - black linen with purple lotus spikes and black margin. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift. The room, bed, lamp and all background stay EXACTLY as in the start frame - do not restyle the room.

sfx.cue: szelest tkaniny + miekki thud maty o posciel

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: 3/4 z wysokosci lozka, mata >=55% szerokosci kadru
kontrakt_produktowy.uzycie: rozwiniecie maty na lozku jednym ruchem
kontrakt_produktowy.placement: mata plasko NA lozku; walek u wezglowia

sceny._cut: tnij w apogeum wygladzania (dlon jeszcze na macie)

sceny.rola: MAKRO ASMR — dlon na lotosach (adresuje 'czy to boli?')
sceny.first_frame_brief_en: Extreme close-up of the purple lotus spikes of the black acupressure mat from the reference images, filling most of the frame - sharp pyramid petals in a regular grid on black linen, warm lamp light grazing across them. A woman's fingertips rest gently on top of a few lotus rosettes, skin slightly dimpled by the points. Photorealistic vertical 9:16 UGC smartphone macro look, natural skin texture, bright warm light.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. The fingertips press slowly down on the purple lotus spikes and drag a few centimeters across them - the skin dimples on the points, the mat fabric gives slightly, a satisfying tactile ASMR moment. The spikes stay EXACTLY as in the reference images - purple lotus rosettes in a regular grid on black linen, no colour change. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift. Background stays exactly as in the start frame.

sfx.cue: cichy plastikowy szelest kolcow pod palcami

kontrakt_produktowy.uzycie: palce przyciskaja i przesuwaja sie po kolcach
must_show: fioletowe lotosy z ostrymi piramidkami z bliska

sceny.rola: UZYCIE — kladzie sie plecami na macie
sceny.first_frame_brief_en: Side view at bed height: a woman around 30 in a cream loungewear set, dark hair in a loose bun, seen from the side-back (face turned away from camera), mid-motion lowering her upper back onto the black acupressure mat from the reference images lying flat on the bed, her head aiming for the half-round pillow roll. The mat is EXACTLY the product from the reference photos - black linen, purple lotus spikes, black margin. Bright cozy bedroom, warm bedside lamp, cream bedding. High-key, photorealistic vertical 9:16 UGC smartphone look.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. The woman slowly and carefully lowers her back onto the black acupressure mat, settling her shoulders onto the purple lotus spikes and her head onto the half-round pillow roll, then exhales as her body relaxes into it. The mat stays flat and EXACTLY the product from the reference images; her face stays turned away from the camera. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift. The room, bed and lighting stay exactly as in the start frame.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: bok/tyl z wysokosci lozka; mata + tulow w kadrze
kontrakt_produktowy.uzycie: polozenie sie PLECAMI na macie, glowa na walku
kontrakt_produktowy.placement: osoba lezy PLECAMI na macie na lozku (nigdy twarza w dol); glowa na walku

sceny._cut: tnij w momencie zetkniecia plecow z mata (match-on-action)

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: Top-down slightly angled view of a woman lying on her back on the black acupressure mat from the reference images on a bed - frame shows her shoulders, arms and upper torso in cream loungewear on the purple lotus spikes, head on the half-round pillow roll at the top edge of frame (face mostly out of frame), arms relaxed alongside the body. Purple lotus spikes visible around her silhouette. Warm bedside lamp glow, cream bedding, high-key, photorealistic vertical 9:16 UGC smartphone look.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. Her shoulders soften and sink a little deeper into the mat, fingers slowly uncurl and relax, a calm slow breath lifts and lowers her chest - pure relief. The mat stays EXACTLY the product from the reference images - purple lotus spikes on black linen around her body. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift, warm cozy light. Background stays exactly as in the start frame.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: top-down lekko z ukosa; ramiona+tulow na macie
kontrakt_produktowy.placement: plecy plasko na macie; twarz poza kadrem/czesciowo

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: Low angle at floor level: the black acupressure mat from the reference images lies flat on a light wooden bedroom floor beside the bed, and a woman's bare feet stand on the purple lotus spikes, mid-step - one foot flat, the other just lifting. Cream loungewear trousers cropped at calves. Warm evening lamp light from the bedside, cream bedding edge visible above. The mat is EXACTLY the product from the reference photos. High-key, photorealistic vertical 9:16 UGC smartphone look, natural skin.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. The bare feet slowly shift weight and step in place on the purple lotus spikes - heels lift and press alternately, the skin of the soles dimples slightly on the points, a gentle balance sway. The mat stays flat on the floor and EXACTLY the product from the reference images. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift. The floor, bed edge and lighting stay exactly as in the start frame.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: niski kat z poziomu podlogi; mata + stopy
kontrakt_produktowy.placement: mata plasko na podlodze przy lozku; obie stopy NA macie

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: (cta_first = nano-CHAIN z hook_first: IDENTYCZNY kadr/sypialnia/swiatlo; zmien TYLKO: mata juz rozlozona plasko z walkiem u wezglowia, dlon kobiety spoczywa plasko na kolcach maty)
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: (cta_last = nano-CHAIN z cta_first: zmien TYLKO pozycje dloni - dlon przy krawedzi maty, w gescie rozpoczynajacego sie zwijania/poprawienia rogu; wszystko inne identyczne)
sceny.motion_prompt_en: The woman's hand gives the purple lotus spikes a gentle final pat and slides to the edge of the mat, starting to lift the corner - as if the evening ritual is about to begin again. The mat stays EXACTLY the product from the reference images, flat on the bed. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift, warm evening light. Background stays exactly as in the start frame.

kontrakt_produktowy.uzycie: tap dloni + gest poczatku zwijania (zapowiedz petli)
kontrakt_produktowy.placement: mata plasko na lozku jak w hooku; walek u wezglowia

sceny._cut: OSTATNIA klatka kreacji = echo PIERWSZEJ (LOOP CLOSE); gest uniesienia rogu przechodzi przez granice petli (hook zaczyna sie od rozwijania!)

loop_close.first_frame_echo: cta konczy sie dlonia przy rogu maty w gescie poczatku zwijania/rozwijania — hook OTWIERA sie rozwijaniem: petla naturalnie zawija (rytual wieczorny povtarza sie)
loop_close.audio_continuity: muzyka bar-aligned przechodzi przez granice petli, bez akcentu-stopu i bez fade; ambient ciagly
loop_close.closing_line_setup: 'Codziennie wieczorem.' ustawia powrot do 'Osiem godzin za biurkiem?' (rytm dnia)

audio.music_brief: warm mellow chillout pop with a steady soft beat from the very first second, cozy evening bedroom vibe, gentle percussion, warm pads, constant energy until the very end, no outro, no fade out, NO lo-fi, NO ambient (seconds_total=25)

ambient_bed.opis: quiet bedroom room tone at evening, very soft house interior ambience, faint fabric rustle, steady and seamless, NO melody, NO music (20 s)

audio._sfx_regula: kazde widoczne zdarzenie fizyczne = foley-hit na timestampie (require_sfx); SFX Stable Audio 10 s + trim lokalny

consistency.produkt: 1 mata + 1 walek (KARTA verbatim); fiolet kolcow IDENTYCZNY we wszystkich scenach; czarna tkanina; margines brzegowy
consistency.rekwizyty: kremowa posciel, ciepla lampka nocna, kremowy komplet domowy kobiety — te same przez cala kreacje
consistency.stany: hook: mata rozwijana na lozku -> kolce: makro na lozku -> lezenie/relaks: mata pod cialem na lozku -> stopy: mata na PODLODZE przy lozku (przeniesienie = ciecie narracyjne, dopuszczalne bo inna czesc rytualu) -> cta: mata z powrotem na lozku (echo hooka)

_rewizja_v2: 20.07 doktryna WIERNOSC WZORCOWI: v1 bez twarzy zgubila nosnik viralnosci; v2 = HYBRYDA testimonial (przebieg_v2.py + plany-15s-v2.json)
